data.title: NHK World airs program on "The Blue Economy in African Nations: Views from Japan." discusses food security, fisheries, and job creation.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, NHK World aired a special program titled "The Blue Economy in African Nations: Views from Japan" in Tokyo. The program discussed various topics such as food security, fisheries modernization, job creation, and resource management. This broadcast aimed to shed light on the importance of promoting sustainable economic development in African nations. This initiative is part of a larger effort to enhance cooperation between Japan and African countries and create opportunities for growth in the region.

data.title: Chinese aid revives Tanzania's Ngorongoro-Lengai Global Geopark with over 50 people witnessing molten lava at 3 am.
data.description: In September 2023, at 3 am, more than 50 individuals hurriedly assembled at the Ol Doinyo Lengai volcano located in the northern section of the Ngorongoro-Lengai Global Geopark in Arusha, Tanzania. They eagerly gathered to witness a spectacular event - molten lava...

data.title: X4 Pharmaceuticals announces $135M public offering of 45.86M shares at $2.90 per share, expected to close on Oct 27.
data.description: X4 Pharmaceuticals has announced the pricing of its underwritten public offering of 45,860,000 shares of common stock at $2.90 per share and pre-funded warrants for 700,000 shares at $2.899 per warrant. The total expected gross proceeds from the offering are approximately $135 million. The offering is set to close on October 27, 2025, with an option for underwriters to purchase an additional 6,984,000 shares within 30 days. All securities are offered by X4 Pharmaceuticals.

data.title: Recent AWS outage emphasizes need for Web3 to embrace decentralized infrastructure to prevent failures and ensure resilience.
data.description: The recent outage on AWS highlights the importance of Web3 transitioning to decentralized infrastructure to avoid critical disruptions and ensure resilience. This shift is crucial to maintaining uptime and stability for online platforms. The increasing reliance on centralized servers poses a risk, as evidenced by the downtime that affected a significant number of websites and services. Moving towards decentralized systems can mitigate such risks and enhance the overall reliability of Web3 applications. It is imperative for developers and organizations to prioritize decentralization in order to safeguard against potential failures and maintain a robust online ecosystem.

data.title: NTT DOCOMO and NTT Com Asia launch “APN InterLink” service in Hong Kong on November 1 for financial institutions.
data.description: Tokyo-based NTT DOCOMO BUSINESS and NTT Com Asia have introduced the "APN InterLink" service in Hong Kong, catering specifically to financial institutions. The service is set to commence on November 1st.

data.title: Prediction market sees chances of Sam Bankman-Fried receiving pardon from Trump rise to 12% post Zhao's pardon.
data.description: The likelihood of former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried being pardoned by US President Trump has increased significantly to approximately 12% on the Polymarket platform. This surge in odds comes after another individual, Changpeng Zhao, received a pardon.

data.title: Bitcoin options open interest hits $63B record high, bullish strike prices($120K-$140K) dominate as bulls gain control.
data.description: The open interest in Bitcoin options has hit an all-time high of $63 billion, indicating a significant level of activity in the market. The majority of bullish strike prices are concentrated between $120,000 and $140,000, suggesting widespread optimism among investors regarding the future price trajectory of Bitcoin.

data.title: Trump halts trade talks with Canada, citing fraudulent ad. US-Canada relations affected.
data.description: The president's decision has once again strained the relationship with one of the United States' top trading partners, following an incident involving an advertisement he considered deceptive.

data.title: Protaryx Medical submits 510(k) for next-gen Transseptal Puncture Device to FDA, aiming to redefine left-heart access.
data.description: Protaryx Medical, a medical device company based in Baltimore, has recently submitted a 510(k) premarket notification to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration for its Transseptal Puncture Device. This device aims to improve access for minimally invasive left-heart procedures. The submission is a significant step in the company's goal to enhance safe and efficient left-atrium access for structural heart interventions. This development showcases Protaryx's commitment to innovation in the medical field.

data.title: Trump-backed World Liberty Financial Token (WLFI) rallies 12%, outshining Bitcoin and Ethereum. WLFI surged over 12% in the last 24 hours, with a 128% increase in trading volume, surpassing BTC and ETH which were up 1.67% and 1.50% respectively.
data.description: The World Liberty Financial (WLFI) token, backed by the Trump family, experienced a remarkable performance on Thursday, surpassing major players in the cryptocurrency market. Within a span of 24 hours, WLFI surged by over 12%, while its trading volume spiked by 128%, demonstrating significant demand and trading activity. This surge allowed WLFI to outperform well-known tokens like Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH), which saw increases of 1.67% and 1.50% respectively during the same period. This news comes amidst increasing scrutiny on cryptocurrency assets, including questioning of a top Trump envoy, Steve Witkoff. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Neolix raises over US$600 million in Series D, setting new record for China's autonomous driving industry.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, Neolix, the leading provider of L4 autonomous delivery solutions known as RoboVan, successfully secured over $600 million in its Series D financing round. This significant achievement represents the largest private fundraising within China's autonomous driving industry thus far.

data.title: Husky Inu (HINU) price jumps to $0.00021800 amid market fluctuations. Cryptocurrency market shows bearish trends.
data.description: Amidst a bearish trend in the overall cryptocurrency market, the value of Husky Inu (HINU) surged to $0.00021800 in its pre-launch phase, as reported by CoinMarketCap.

data.title: BioLab Holdings invests in Cold Atmospheric Plasma Tech to develop antimicrobial solutions, focusing on wound care & dermatology.
data.description: BioLab Holdings, Inc., a Phoenix company specializing in wound care products, has made a strategic investment to advance portable antimicrobial solutions for wound care and dermatology. The partnership was announced on October 24, 2025.

data.title: New poetry collection 'A Pocketful of Poems' by Craig Pugh delves into various themes like love, loss, and laughter.
data.description: In his latest poetry collection, Craig Pugh delves into the realms of coffee, cats, marriage, and the art of writing. The book, set in OMAHA, Neb., released on Oct. 24, 2025, offers readers a glimpse into a unique universe where coffee is brewed with distinctiveness, cats personify enigma and playfulness, and matrimony perseveres with levity. Pugh intricately weaves these elements together to create a captivating narrative that transports readers into a world filled with charm and wit.

data.title: Singtel's RE:AI wins Frost & Sullivan's 2025 SEA Competitive Strategy Leadership award for GPU-as-a-Service innovation.
data.description: RE:AI has established new benchmarks in AI infrastructure excellence and enterprise-level GPU-as-a-Service delivery by incorporating compute, connectivity, applications, and orchestration. The announcement was made in San Antonio on October 24, 2025. Singtel's AI cloud, as recognized by Frost & Sullivan, has set a significant standard in this regard.

data.title: Alaska's Glenfarne signs Tokyo Gas LOI for 1M MTPA of LNG from Alaska LNG project. Expanding commercial momentum.
data.description: In a joint statement, Glenfarne Alaska LNG, LLC and Tokyo Gas Co., Ltd. revealed the signing of a Letter of Intent for Tokyo Gas to offake one million tonnes per annum of liquefied natural gas from the Alaska LNG project. Glenfarne is the majority owner and developer of the project. Tokyo Gas, a prominent energy utility in Japan known for its expertise in LNG procurement, will be obtaining the mentioned quantity from this initiative. This collaboration marks a significant step in the global energy sector, combining the strengths of both entities.

data.title: India to send tens of millions of workers to countries facing labor shortages like Germany and Japan for employment.
data.description: India intends to deploy its extensive labor force to nations experiencing shortages, including Germany and Japan. The initiative aims to address labor demands in those countries and capitalize on the skills of Indian workers. This plan is expected to involve a significant number of workers, potentially benefiting both India and the receiving nations through increased employment opportunities and enhanced economic cooperation.

data.title: Book "When Enough Is Never Enough" explains how to find contentment through personal experience, psychology, and mindfulness.
data.description: A newly released book, "When Enough Is Never Enough," from Balboa Press combines personal anecdotes, psychological insights, and mindfulness practices to guide readers in breaking free from the cycle of discontent. This book, released in Scottsdale, Arizona on October 24, 2025, questions the root cause of chronic dissatisfaction despite living in an era of abundance. The author's blend of personal experiences, psychological perspectives, and mindfulness techniques offers readers a comprehensive approach to addressing this issue. Through this book, readers can explore ways to overcome feelings of inadequacy and find contentment in a world where plenty exists.

data.title: Zepz launches Sendwave wallet with stablecoins for global money transfers, reduces currency risks & improves access.
data.description: The Sendwave Wallet offers a secure and global peer-to-peer cross-border money transfer solution. Supported by stablecoin technology from Circle, Solana, and Portal, the wallet addresses issues such as currency devaluation and financial accessibility. Available to customers worldwide, the wallet provides a reliable platform for seamless money transfers.

data.title: SHIB gains attention with T. Rowe Price ETF inclusion, signaling institutional interest in cryptocurrency.
data.description: The value of Shiba Inu (SHIB) could potentially reverse its trend following its inclusion in a new Multi-Coin ETF by T. Rowe Price, showcasing a rise in institutional attention.
